meta.title: Sale Celebration Sticker | Isaac Plans
meta.description: Create an amazing WhatsApp sticker to celebrate every sale you close.
meta.keywords: sale sticker, WhatsApp sticker, final expense, agent tools, celebrate sale

saleSticker.title: Sale Celebration Sticker
saleSticker.subtitle: Closed a sale? Make a stunning WhatsApp sticker to celebrate it.

meta.title: Sale Celebration Stickers for Agents | Isaac Plans
meta.description: Turn every closed final expense sale into a branded WhatsApp celebration sticker — numbered by day, with your photo and logo, in English or Spanish.
meta.keywords: sale celebration sticker, WhatsApp sticker for agents, final expense agent tools, sale of the day, Isaac Plans

landing.shareText: Turn every closed sale into a branded WhatsApp celebration sticker — numbered by day, with your photo and logo.
landing.heroSubtitle: Log the win in seconds and get a share-ready WhatsApp sticker — your photo, your logo, the client's name, and the day's sale count. Static, die-cut, or animated.
landing.ctaHint: Use your Isaac Plans agent account
landing.trustLine: Built for licensed final expense agents
landing.previewLabel: What you'll drop in the group chat
landing.featuresTitle: Turn every close into team momentum
landing.featuresSubtitle: Stop typing “another one closed 🎉” — drop a branded sticker in the group chat instead.
landing.feature1Body: Every sticker is numbered for you — sale #1, #2, #3 of the day. The count resets each morning, so your streak is always front and center.
landing.feature2Body: Your headshot, company logo, and name come straight from your Leave-Behind agent profile. Set it up once, reuse it everywhere.
landing.feature3Body: Download a full image, a die-cut WhatsApp sticker, an animated sticker, or a GIF — whatever the chat calls for.
landing.feature4Body: The sticker text switches language independently of the site, so you can celebrate with every client and every team in their language.
landing.howSubtitle: Three steps from closed deal to group-chat glory
landing.step1Body: Add your photo, logo, and contact details — one time. Your Leave-Behind profile carries over automatically.
landing.step2Body: Client name, lead source, in-person or telesales, and an optional phrase — the sticker builds itself live as you type.
landing.step3Body: Send it straight to WhatsApp or download it — then get back to selling.
landing.finalTitle: Ready to celebrate your next close?
landing.finalSubtitle: Sign in, log the sale, and drop the sticker in the chat before the ink dries.

profileRequired.title: Complete your agent profile first
profileRequired.hint: Add your photo, company logo, and name so every sticker shows your branding. Your Leave-Behind profile is reused here.

form.title: Design your sticker
form.description: Fill in the sale details—your sticker updates live on the right.
form.numberPreview: This will be sale #{n} of the day
form.numberCommitted: Saved as sale #{n} of the day
form.languageHint: Sets the language of the text on the sticker (independent of the site language).
form.extraImageHint: Add a small personal image for an extra touch (logo, mascot, photo).

preview.hint: Download as a full image or as a WhatsApp sticker.
